stemHtml: Decompression sickness symptoms may develop due to…

options.a: cabin pressure loss when flying at higher altitudes (above 18000 ft).
options.b: fast flights from a high-pressure zone into a low-pressure area when flying an unpressurised aeroplane.
options.c: sudden pressure surges in the cabin at altitudes below 18000 ft.
options.d: emergency descents without cabin pressure loss.
